name: Iso11783OPChangeFontAttribute
title: Iso11783OPChangeFontAttribute
syntax: long Iso11783OPChangeFontAttribute( dword ecuHandle, dword objectID, dword color, dword size, dword type, dword style );
description: The function changes the properties of a font attribute object. A Change Font Attribute command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)
